title: Citrusy Crunchy Slovakian Carrots Stir‑fry
description: A bright, one‑pot Slovakian stir‑fry that pairs crisp carrots with citrus zest and a sweet soy glaze for a quick, kosher‑friendly dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium‑high heat.
Add the julienned carrots and sliced bell pepper, stir‑frying for 3‑4 minutes until slightly softened but still crisp.
Stir in the shredded cabbage, cooking another 2 minutes until just wilted.
Add the minced garlic and ginger, sautéing for 30 seconds until fragrant.
In a small bowl whisk together the kosher soy sauce, honey, lemon zest, lemon juice, and orange juice; pour over the vegetables.
Cook for 2‑3 more minutes, stirring constantly, until the sauce thickens slightly and coats the vegetables.
Remove from heat, sprinkle with toasted sesame seeds if using, and serve immediately.
Optional: garnish with fresh chopped parsley or dill for added freshness.
